title: Major Update! Claude Code Now Supports iOS Simulator - A Boon for Developers!
excerpt: Artificial intelligence company Anthropic recently announced a major update to its desktop programming tool, Claude Code: the official introduction of support f
content_html:
Artificial intelligence company Anthropic recently announced a major update to its desktop programming tool, Claude Code: the official introduction of support for Apple's iOS simulator. This new feature is now available for public testing, marking a significant change in how developers work.

According to the official introduction, developers can now open the application they are developing directly within a dedicated iOS simulator panel when building, running, or checking an application with Claude Code. This means developers can monitor and interact with the simulator's operation in real time without switching to other tools. Claude Code will continue to iterate until the project is finally completed. This new approach not only improves development efficiency but also makes the development process smoother.

Notably, this integration uses a unique panel method to directly drive the simulator, eliminating the hassle of traditional computer vision operations, especially the complex permissions required for accessibility features and screen recording on macOS systems. This allows developers to focus on writing code without worrying about complicated operational processes.

However, Anthropic also reminds users that since Claude captures screen images while running the iOS simulator and sends them to the server for storage, it is recommended that users avoid logging into real personal accounts on test devices to ensure privacy and security.

Currently, this iOS simulator integration feature is designed specifically for the desktop version of Claude Code on the macOS platform, provided that users have installed the Xcode environment containing the iOS platform on their computers. Additionally, the simulator panel is only supported for use within local sessions, and users need to maintain a connection to experience it smoothly.

With the addition of iOS simulator support, Claude Code will further enhance developers' efficiency and help bring more innovative applications to life. We look forward to this feature making a positive impact on the broader developer community.

sentences.zh: 人工智能公司Anthropic近日宣布对其桌面编程工具Claude Code进行重大更新：正式引入对苹果iOS模拟器的支持。

sentences.en: This new feature is now available for public testing, marking a significant change in how developers work.
sentences.zh: 这项新功能现已可供公开测试，标志着开发人员工作方式的重大变化。

blocks.html_en: According to the official introduction, developers can now open the application they are developing directly within a dedicated iOS simulator panel when building, running, or checking an application with Claude Code. Claude Code will continue to iterate until the project is finally completed. This new approach not only improves development efficiency but also makes the development process smoother.

sentences.en: According to the official introduction, developers can now open the application they are developing directly within a dedicated iOS simulator panel when building, running, or checking an application with Claude Code.
sentences.zh: 据官方介绍，开发者现在可以在使用 Claude Code 构建、运行或检查应用程序时，直接在专用的 iOS 模拟器面板中打开他们正在开发的应用程序。

sentences.en: This means developers can monitor and interact with the simulator's operation in real time without switching to other tools.
sentences.zh: 这意味着开发人员可以实时监控模拟器的操作并与之交互，而无需切换到其他工具。

sentences.en: Claude Code will continue to iterate until the project is finally completed.
sentences.zh: Claude Code 将不断迭代，直到项目最终完成。

sentences.en: This new approach not only improves development efficiency but also makes the development process smoother.
sentences.zh: 这种新的方式不仅提高了开发效率，也让开发过程更加顺畅。

This allows developers to focus on writing code without worrying about complicated operational processes.

sentences.en: Notably, this integration uses a unique panel method to directly drive the simulator, eliminating the hassle of traditional computer vision operations, especially the complex permissions required for accessibility features and screen recording on macOS systems.
sentences.zh: 值得注意的是，这种集成采用独特的面板方式直接驱动模拟器，消除了传统计算机视觉操作的麻烦，尤其是 macOS 系统上辅助功能和屏幕录制所需的复杂权限。

sentences.en: This allows developers to focus on writing code without worrying about complicated operational processes.
sentences.zh: 这使得开发人员可以专注于编写代码，而不必担心复杂的操作流程。

sentences.en: However, Anthropic also reminds users that since Claude captures screen images while running the iOS simulator and sends them to the server for storage, it is recommended that users avoid logging into real personal accounts on test devices to ensure privacy and security.
sentences.zh: 不过，Anthropic也提醒用户，由于Claude在运行iOS模拟器时会捕获屏幕图像并将其发送到服务器进行存储，因此建议用户避免在测试设备上登录真实的个人帐户，以确保隐私和安全。

blocks.html_en: Currently, this iOS simulator integration feature is designed specifically for the desktop version of Claude Code on the macOS platform, provided that users have installed the Xcode environment containing the iOS platform on their computers. Additionally, the simulator panel is only supported for use within local sessions, and users need to maintain a connection to experience it smoothly.

sentences.en: Currently, this iOS simulator integration feature is designed specifically for the desktop version of Claude Code on the macOS platform, provided that users have installed the Xcode environment containing the iOS platform on their computers.
sentences.zh: 目前，这个iOS模拟器集成功能是专门为macOS平台上的Claude Code桌面版设计的，前提是用户已经在电脑上安装了包含iOS平台的Xcode环境。

sentences.en: Additionally, the simulator panel is only supported for use within local sessions, and users need to maintain a connection to experience it smoothly.
sentences.zh: 此外，模拟器面板仅支持在本地会话中使用，用户需要保持连接才能顺利体验。

blocks.html_en: With the addition of iOS simulator support, Claude Code will further enhance developers' efficiency and help bring more innovative applications to life. We look forward to this feature making a positive impact on the broader developer community.

sentences.en: With the addition of iOS simulator support, Claude Code will further enhance developers' efficiency and help bring more innovative applications to life.
sentences.zh: 随着iOS模拟器支持的加入，Claude Code将进一步提高开发人员的效率，帮助将更多创新应用程序变为现实。

sentences.en: We look forward to this feature making a positive impact on the broader developer community.
sentences.zh: 我们期待这一功能对更广泛的开发者社区产生积极影响。

content_html_zh:
人工智能公司Anthropic近日宣布对其桌面编程工具Claude Code进行重大更新：正式引入对苹果iOS模拟器的支持。 这项新功能现已可供公开测试，标志着开发人员工作方式的重大变化。

据官方介绍，开发者现在可以在使用 Claude Code 构建、运行或检查应用程序时，直接在专用的 iOS 模拟器面板中打开他们正在开发的应用程序。 这意味着开发人员可以实时监控模拟器的操作并与之交互，而无需切换到其他工具。 Claude Code 将不断迭代，直到项目最终完成。 这种新的方式不仅提高了开发效率，也让开发过程更加顺畅。

值得注意的是，这种集成采用独特的面板方式直接驱动模拟器，消除了传统计算机视觉操作的麻烦，尤其是 macOS 系统上辅助功能和屏幕录制所需的复杂权限。 这使得开发人员可以专注于编写代码，而不必担心复杂的操作流程。

不过，Anthropic也提醒用户，由于Claude在运行iOS模拟器时会捕获屏幕图像并将其发送到服务器进行存储，因此建议用户避免在测试设备上登录真实的个人帐户，以确保隐私和安全。

目前，这个iOS模拟器集成功能是专门为macOS平台上的Claude Code桌面版设计的，前提是用户已经在电脑上安装了包含iOS平台的Xcode环境。 此外，模拟器面板仅支持在本地会话中使用，用户需要保持连接才能顺利体验。

随着iOS模拟器支持的加入，Claude Code将进一步提高开发人员的效率，帮助将更多创新应用程序变为现实。 我们期待这一功能对更广泛的开发者社区产生积极影响。
